rules.trade_description: PHX's pick is in the main pool {BRK, PHI(if 9-30), PHX, NYK}. BRK gets most/two most favorable. PHX ends up with the absolute least favorable of all four picks: WAS competes against the LF of {BRK, PHI, PHX} and PHX receives the worse of (WAS, LF). PHX's own pick goes to BRK if it's among the most favorable, to NYK if 2nd of {BRK, PHX, NYK}, or stays with PHX if it's the absolute worst.
